# tests

Validate Attractor pipeline engine end-to-end. Covers DOT graph parsing, structural validation, CSS-like stylesheet application, execution orchestration with conditional routing, goal gates, retry loops, context propagation.

## Contents

### Integration Test Suite

- [integration.rs](./integration.rs): Linear pipelines, branching conditionals, validation errors, stylesheet overrides, context propagation, goal gate satisfaction, retry mechanisms, edge weight resolution.

## Test Fixtures

`build_graph(dot: &str) -> PipelineGraph`: Parse DOT via `attractor_dot::parse`, wrap in `PipelineGraph::from_dot`, panic on construction failure.

`MockCodergenHandler`: `#[async_trait]` implementation of `NodeHandler`, `handler_type()` returns `"codergen"`, `execute()` returns `StageStatus::Success` with context injection.

`executor() -> PipelineExecutor`: Constructs `HandlerRegistry` with `StartHandler` (type `"start"`), `ExitHandler` (type `"exit"`), `ConditionalHandler` (type `"conditional"`), `MockCodergenHandler` (type `"codergen"`), returns `PipelineExecutor::new(registry)`.

## Behavioral Contracts

DOT shape literals: `Mdiamond` (start node), `Msquare` (exit node), `box` (process node), `diamond` (conditional node).

DOT attribute strings: `goal_gate=true`, `retry_target="start"`, `prompt="Process data"`, `condition="outcome=success"`, `weight=1`, `class="fast"`.

Stylesheet patterns:

- Universal selector: `* { llm_model: default-model; llm_provider: anthropic; }`
- Class selector: `.fast { llm_model: fast-model; }`
- ID selector: `#summarize { llm_model: summarize-model; reasoning_effort: high; }`

Context key templates: `{node_id}.completed`, `{node_id}.prompt`, `{node_id}.result`, literal keys `outcome`, `goal`.

Error variant: `AttractorError::GoalGateUnsatisfied { node: String }`.

## Test Coverage Categories

Linear execution: `simple_linear_pipeline_completes_in_order`, `ten_node_linear_pipeline_completes`.

Conditional routing: `branching_pipeline_routes_via_condition`, `condition_routes_to_fallback_on_no_match`, `edge_selection_respects_condition_over_weight`.

Goal gates: `goal_gate_satisfied_pipeline_completes`, `goal_gate_unsatisfied_without_retry_returns_error`, `goal_gate_with_retry_target_retries_then_succeeds`.

Structural validation: `validation_catches_missing_start_node`, `validation_catches_multiple_errors`, `validation_detects_unreachable_nodes`.

Stylesheet application: `stylesheet_applies_model_to_nodes`.

Context propagation: `context_propagation_across_nodes`, `graph_goal_attribute_propagates_to_context`.

Edge resolution: `edge_weight_tiebreaker_selects_highest_weight`.

## Dependencies

`attractor_dot::parse`, `attractor_pipeline::{apply_stylesheet, parse_stylesheet, validate, validate_or_raise, ConditionalHandler, ExitHandler, HandlerRegistry, NodeHandler, PipelineExecutor, PipelineGraph, PipelineNode, Severity, StartHandler}`, `attractor_types::{AttractorError, Context, Outcome, StageStatus}`, `async_trait::async_trait`, `serde_json`, `std::sync::{Arc, AtomicUsize, Ordering}`, `std::collections::HashMap`.
